description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Update Docker images that runs on a weekly schedule and can be triggered manually. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to build Docker images for multiple architectures and distributions, including x86_64, i386, arm64, and armhf, with some builds producing Lite AppImage. For each build, checkout the code, set up QEMU integration for Docker, and then build and upload the Docker image using a provided script and credentials from secrets.
